concerns_inventory.name: BetterTogether::PrimaryCommunity

concerns_inventory.name: BetterTogether::Privacy
concerns_inventory.label: Privacy
concerns_inventory.capability: Adds privacy enum helpers and shared visibility semantics.
concerns_inventory.risk: Shared helpers can over-broaden access when “community” or admin semantics drift.

concerns_inventory.name: BetterTogether::Protected
concerns_inventory.label: Protected
concerns_inventory.capability: Adds protected-record safeguards for records that should resist accidental mutation/deletion.
concerns_inventory.risk: Protected status can be mistaken for an authorization model when it is only a lifecycle safeguard.

concerns_inventory.name: BetterTogether::Searchable
concerns_inventory.label: Searchable

concerns_inventory.risk: Search can become a visibility bypass if model scopes and indexed payloads drift.

concerns_inventory.name: BetterTogether::Seedable
concerns_inventory.label: Seedable
concerns_inventory.capability: Adds seed/import/export helper behavior for reusable content and onboarding flows.
concerns_inventory.risk: Seed portability can carry stale permissions or provenance unless metadata stays explicit.

concerns_inventory.name: BetterTogether::TimezoneAttributeAliasing

concerns_inventory.capability: Adds consistent timezone aliases and coercion for scheduler-facing models.
concerns_inventory.risk: Hidden timezone aliasing can obscure which timestamps are canonical.

concerns_inventory.name: BetterTogether::Claimable

concerns_inventory.capability: Adds claim/evidence linkage for governance, publishing, and provenance review.
concerns_inventory.risk: Weak evidence discipline can make claim graphs look authoritative without enough source context.

concerns_inventory.name: BetterTogether::Creatable
concerns_inventory.label: Creatable
concerns_inventory.capability: Adds creator ownership hooks and creator-aware defaults.
concerns_inventory.risk: Creator fallback behavior can accidentally widen operational visibility.

concerns_inventory.name: BetterTogether::FriendlySlug
concerns_inventory.label: FriendlySlug
concerns_inventory.capability: Adds translated/human-friendly slugs for routes and lookup.
concerns_inventory.risk: Slug uniqueness and routing ambiguity become cross-domain concerns when federation is involved.

concerns_inventory.capability: Adds canonical identifiers and slug/lookup helpers used across APIs and UI.
concerns_inventory.risk: Identifier reuse across platforms or mirrors can blur provenance without explicit platform context.

concerns_inventory.name: BetterTogether::Invitable

concerns_inventory.name: BetterTogether::Protected

concerns_inventory.risk: Search can become a visibility bypass if model scopes and indexed payloads drift.

concerns_inventory.name: BetterTogether::Seedable

concerns_inventory.capability: Adds seed/import/export helper behavior for reusable content and onboarding flows.
concerns_inventory.risk: Seed portability can carry stale permissions or provenance unless metadata stays explicit.

concerns_inventory.name: BetterTogether::TimezoneAttributeAliasing
concerns_inventory.label: TimezoneAttributeAliasing
concerns_inventory.capability: Adds consistent timezone aliases and coercion for scheduler-facing models.
concerns_inventory.risk: Hidden timezone aliasing can obscure which timestamps are canonical.

concerns_inventory.name: BetterTogether::TrackedActivity
concerns_inventory.label: TrackedActivity
concerns_inventory.capability: Adds PublicActivity hooks and activity-feed integration.
concerns_inventory.risk: Activity streams can reveal private operations if trackable scoping is too broad.

concerns_inventory.name: BetterTogether::Viewable

concerns_inventory.risk: View analytics and cache helpers can become privacy-sensitive telemetry surfaces.
